nasb.text: Some Pharisees came up to Jesus, testing Him, and began to question Him whether it was lawful for a man to divorce a wife.

esv.text: And Pharisees came up and in order to test him asked, “Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife?”

cnv.text: 有法利賽人前來試探耶穌，問他：“丈夫可以休妻嗎？”

ccb.text: 一些法利赛人想试探耶稣，就来问祂：“男人可以休妻吗？”

csbs.text: 有些法利赛人前来试探耶稣，问他：“人是否可以休妻呢？”
